metadata.title: Servis Takip
metadata.description: Multi-tenant operations panel for technical service teams

dashboard.title: Operations dashboard
dashboard.description: Track service workload, ready deliveries, and the daily finance summary from one screen.

recentRecords.title: Recent Devices
recentRecords.description: Most recent records received by the operations desk

today.title: Today's work
today.description: Manage today's appointments, urgent records, and action-required service items for the operations team on one screen.

empty.title: No work for today
empty.description: No appointments or attention-required records match the selected filter.

cash.title: Cash & accounts
cash.description: Monitor daily collections, expenses, and pending receivables from a single list.

table.title: Transaction list
table.description: Items linked to service records or customers provide direct navigation to detail pages.

empty.description: There are no income, expense, or pending receivable items to display for the selected view.

reports.title: Reports
reports.description: Review operational visibility, sensitive finance summaries, and team workload from a mock reporting planning surface.

mockBanner.title: Mock reporting surface
mockBanner.description: This screen is frontend planning/mock only. Real reports require backend aggregation, tenant filtering, RBAC, and audit/export logging; this surface does not implement them.

filters.title: Date range
filters.description: When the selection changes, the displayed mock data updates client-side.

financialSummary.mockNote: Finance values are demo-only. Real visibility must be protected by backend permissions and tenant scope.

statusDistribution.title: Service status distribution
statusDistribution.description: Status intensity for the selected range is shown as a mock distribution.

staff.title: Staff workload and performance
staff.description: Team comparison is shown as mock, permission-sensitive planning data.

breakdowns.title: Category / device / service-type breakdown
breakdowns.description: Category, device type, and service type intensity are summarized with planning-only mock distribution.

export.title: Report preparation and export readiness
export.description: PDF, Excel, and export flows do not generate real files in this phase; they only show readiness expectations.
export.notImplemented: Real export is not implemented yet.
export.backendRequirements: Real reports require backend aggregation, tenant filtering, server-side RBAC, and export/audit logging.

success.title: Mock preparation complete
success.nonPersistent: No file was generated. This message is non-persistent and does not perform a real export.

parts.title: Stock & parts
parts.description: Track spare-part visibility, low-stock risks, and recent movements from a mock planning surface.

mockBanner.title: Mock inventory surface
mockBanner.description: This module is frontend planning/mock only. Prices, costs, and stock movements do not provide real security; persistence, tenant enforcement, audit logging, and RBAC are not implemented yet.

summary.mockValueNote: This is a planning-only mock total. Real price/cost visibility must be constrained by backend permissions.

filters.searchPlaceholder: Search by SKU, part name, brand, or device type

list.title: Parts list
list.description: Sale price is visible while cost remains hidden behind a mock permission caveat.
list.costVisibilityDescription: Cost price is hidden in this phase. Real cost visibility must be protected by permission/RBAC and tenant scope.

alerts.title: Low-stock alerts
alerts.description: Track critical parts before service work gets blocked.
alerts.empty: No low-stock alerts are currently visible.

movements.title: Recent stock movements
movements.description: Purchase, reservation, usage, and adjustment movements are listed in a mock timeline.

notes.supplier_restock: Stock was refreshed through supplier purchasing.
notes.reserved_for_waiting_part: Part was reserved for a waiting service record.
notes.used_in_repair: Part was used in an active repair.
notes.buffer_stock_added: Additional stock was entered as safety buffer.

reserve.title: Reserve part for service record
reserve.description: Link the selected part to a service record in mock mode and preview the reservation impact.
reserve.quantityHint: Maximum reservable quantity in this session: {count}
reserve.bannerDescription: This reservation updates only the client-side demo view. Real stock deduction requires a backend flow with audit logging, tenant scope, and RBAC controls.

validation.quantityExceeds: Available quantity can be at most {count}.
validation.generic: Mock reservation could not be completed. Check the form fields.

success.title: Mock reservation created
success.nonPersistent: This result is not persistent; a real stock movement must not be treated as valid until backend audit logging, tenant enforcement, and server-side RBAC exist.

empty.title: No parts found
empty.description: No parts match your current search or filter criteria. Clear the filters and try again.

staff.title: Staff
staff.description: Monitor team availability, assigned workload, and recent service assignments.
staff.securityNote: Role/permission (RBAC) and user management are not implemented yet. This screen is an MVP demo overview; real access restrictions must be enforced by backend auth + tenant guards.
staff.readOnlyNote: Staff create and edit flows in this phase are mock/planning surfaces only. Role changes and permission matrices do not provide real security; server-side RBAC guards are still required.

filters.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, phone, or email

form.roleMockHint: The role field is planning-only here; real permission assignment must be enforced by backend RBAC.

create.title: Create staff member
create.description: This modal generates a mock record. The returned staff ID is for demo use only and disappears after refresh.

success.title: Mock staff created
success.description: Generated a demo staff ID for {name}: {id}
success.nonPersistent: This result is not persistent; the backend create endpoint and audit log flow are not connected yet.

detail.title: Staff detail
detail.description: View profile summary, recent assignments, and the role/permission planning surface together.
detail.notFound: Staff detail could not be found.
detail.securityDescription: This editing surface is for UI planning only. Changing role or status here does not grant real access; security does not exist until backend RBAC guards are implemented.

success.title: Mock staff updated
success.description: Changes for {name} were updated in this session view only.
success.nonPersistent: This edit was not written to the backend, did not produce an audit log, and did not create a real permission model.

permissions.title: Role / permission draft
permissions.description: The matrix below is for planning only; there is no backend enforcement yet.
permissions.roleTemplateLabel: Planned access view for the {role} role
permissions.mockDescription: This table is not real security. Module access must be enforced by backend auth, tenant scope, and server-side permission guards.

notes.ADMIN_SERVICE_RECORDS: Planned ability to open, assign, and update every service record.
notes.ADMIN_CUSTOMERS: Planned full management for customers and linked device records.
notes.ADMIN_DEVICES: Planned visibility into device inventory and full service history.
notes.ADMIN_CASH: Planned full access to collections, expenses, and cash reconciliation.
notes.ADMIN_STAFF_SETTINGS: Staff/settings management should only be enabled after backend RBAC guards exist.
notes.TECHNICIAN_SERVICE_RECORDS: Planned operational work on assigned service records and status progression.
notes.TECHNICIAN_CUSTOMERS: Planned limited visibility into customer contact details required for service execution.
notes.TECHNICIAN_DEVICES: Planned access to device details and technical history.
notes.TECHNICIAN_CASH: Cash access should not be granted without an explicit backend policy.
notes.TECHNICIAN_STAFF_SETTINGS: Staff/settings management should not be planned for technicians.
notes.RECEPTION_SERVICE_RECORDS: Intake creation and status follow-up can be planned, while sensitive actions stay protected.
notes.RECEPTION_CUSTOMERS: Planned full capture of customer contact and intake information.
notes.RECEPTION_DEVICES: Planned limited intake-level device registration access.
notes.RECEPTION_CASH: Candidate limited access for collection-ready financial flows.
notes.RECEPTION_STAFF_SETTINGS: Reception should not receive staff/settings access.
notes.ACCOUNTING_SERVICE_RECORDS: Planned reference access to service status for billing context.
notes.ACCOUNTING_CUSTOMERS: Planned limited access to customer data needed for billing and collections.
notes.ACCOUNTING_DEVICES: Technical device detail access should stay off by default for accounting.
notes.ACCOUNTING_CASH: Planned ownership of collections, expenses, and reconciliation workflows.
notes.ACCOUNTING_STAFF_SETTINGS: Accounting should not receive staff/settings management access.

empty.filteredTitle: No staff found for selected filters
empty.description: No staff members match your current search or filter criteria.

settings.title: General settings
settings.description: Review company identity, operations summary, and security readiness from one screen.

mockBanner.title: Mock settings surface
mockBanner.description: This screen is a frontend planning/mock phase. The save action only updates the client-side view; backend persistence, tenant config writes, notification delivery, and audit logging are not wired yet.

companyProfile.title: Company profile
companyProfile.description: Mock-edit the identity and default display fields.
companyProfile.mockNote: Editing here updates only the current client-side view for this session. Real company settings persistence requires a backend endpoint, tenant checks, and audit logging.

success.title: Mock settings updated
success.description: The displayed company profile for {name} was updated in this session.
success.nonPersistent: This success state does not mean persistent storage; the mock data resets after refresh.

branchOperation.title: Branch and service operations
branchOperation.description: Summarize branch coverage, working hours, and service record numbering.
branchOperation.backendNote: Branch, working-hours, and public tracking flows are summary-only in this phase. Real configuration writes and the public customer-facing flow must be implemented on the backend.

publicTrackingModes.PLANNED: Tracking-link planning is visible, while customer-facing view and token validation still await backend integration.

notifications.title: Notification readiness
notifications.description: Shows the planned state of customer communication channels.
notifications.mockOnlyNote: SMS, email, and WhatsApp are readiness toggles only in this phase; real delivery, provider integrations, and preference storage still require backend work.

channelDescriptions.sms: Planned channel for appointment, status-change, and ready-for-delivery notifications.
channelDescriptions.email: Planned channel for quotes, summaries, and post-delivery communication.
channelDescriptions.whatsapp: Channel being evaluated for tracking links and quick status responses.

security.title: Security and readiness
security.description: Track backend-required security concerns as a read-only checklist.
security.backendRequiredDescription: The items below provide visibility only on the frontend. Auth, RBAC, tenant guards, audit logging, and signed file URL flows must be enforced on the backend for real security.

auth.title: Authentication
auth.description: Sessions, access/refresh token lifecycles, and route enforcement must be wired into the backend auth layer.

rbac.title: RBAC guards
rbac.description: Role and permission decisions must be validated by server-side guards/policies, not by hiding buttons.

tenant_guard.title: Tenant guard
tenant_guard.description: Multi-tenant data access must be constrained by company scope across all queries.

audit_log.title: Audit log
audit_log.description: Settings writes and critical updates must log actor, entity, and changed fields.

signed_file_urls.title: Signed file URLs
signed_file_urls.description: Files and photos must be served through authorization-aware signed URLs instead of public links.

timezone.title: Timezone
timezone.description: Frontend date/time formatting is planned around this default.

serviceRecords.title: Service records
serviceRecords.description: Track every service record on the operations desk, filter the list, and continue to the new-record flow from here.

filters.searchPlaceholder: Search by tracking code, customer, or device...

empty.title: No records found
empty.description: There are no service records matching the current search and filters. Clear the filters and try again.

newPage.title: The new service record form will open in the next phase
newPage.description: This route is reserved to lock the information architecture for the new record form. Customer, device, and fault details will be collected here in the next frontend phase.

newForm.title: Create a new service record
newForm.description: Create the service record linked to an existing customer; add a new customer and device inline when needed.

fields.customerSearchPlaceholder: Search by name, phone, or email

validation.customerRequired: Select an existing customer or complete the new customer fields.
validation.deviceRequired: Select an existing device or complete the new device fields.

hints.noDeviceForCustomer: No saved device found for this customer. Please add a new device.

devicePicker.emptyDescription: Select a registered customer device or continue with a new device.
devicePicker.customerRequiredDescription: Select a customer first to list registered devices.
devicePicker.searchPlaceholder: Filter by brand, model, or serial/IMEI
devicePicker.noResultDescription: No devices matched this filter. You can continue by adding a new device.

preselectWarnings.customerNotFound: Preselection was not applied because the customer in the link was not found.
preselectWarnings.deviceNotFound: Device preselection was not applied because the device in the link was not found.
preselectWarnings.deviceCustomerMismatch: Device preselection was not applied because the selected device does not belong to this customer.

customerSelector.emptyDescription: Open customer search to continue with an existing customer, or add a new one.
customerSelector.modalDescription: Search by name, phone, or email to select a customer.
customerSelector.minCharactersHint: Type at least 2 characters to see results.
customerSelector.noResultDescription: No customer matched this search. You can continue by adding a new customer.
customerSelector.refineSearchHint: More matches exist. Refine your search to narrow down results.

timeline.title: Operation history
timeline.subtitle: Timeline
timeline.emptyDescription: Operation history for this service record will appear here.

workItems.title: Notes and work items
workItems.description: This section will be populated with technical notes, to-dos, and work items in the next phase.

notFound.title: Service record could not be displayed
notFound.description: Service record with id {id} was not found or is out of view scope.

list.title: Customer list
list.description: Search customers and track device counts with open service workload on a single screen.
list.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, phone, or email...

empty.description: The customer list does not match this criteria. Try a different search value.

actions.newServiceRecord: Create service record for this customer

devices.title: Linked devices
devices.noDeviceHistory: No service history for this device.
devices.mismatchError: This device is not linked to this customer or is out of view scope.
devices.emptyTitle: No device linked to this customer
devices.emptyDescription: This section will list devices when a new one is added.

serviceHistory.title: Service history
serviceHistory.description: Recent customer service records are listed with tracking code and status.
serviceHistory.emptyDescription: Service records for this customer will appear here.

notFound.title: Customer details could not be displayed
notFound.description: Customer with id {id} was not found or is out of view scope.

create.title: Create new customer
create.description: Create the customer first, then attach customer-linked devices in the service flow.

validation.name: Customer name is required.
validation.summary: Complete the required fields to create the customer.

success.title: Customer creation completed
success.description: Mock customer created for {name}. Temporary customer id: {id}
success.nonPersistent: In this phase the record is not persisted; refreshing the page will not update the list.

list.title: Device list
list.description: Search devices by brand/model or customer information and track ownership context through customer cards.
list.searchPlaceholder: Search by brand, model, serial, IMEI, customer name, or phone...

empty.description: The device list does not match this criteria. Try a different search value.

actions.newServiceRecord: Create service record for this device

serviceHistory.title: Service history for this device
serviceHistory.description: Service records linked to this device are listed with tracking code and status.
serviceHistory.emptyTitle: No service history for this device
serviceHistory.emptyDescription: It will appear here when a new service record is created.

detail.createServiceRecordHint: The new service record action currently navigates to /service-records/new. Device/customer preselection is not yet passed in this phase.

notFound.title: Device details could not be displayed
notFound.description: Device with id {id} was not found or is out of view scope.

placeholder.title: This module will open in the next phase
placeholder.description: Only the app shell and dashboard were productionized in the first frontend phase. This route is already reserved to lock the information architecture.
